_doc: Pre-commit honors carded test failures (#2497). CI does NOT use this file. Entries are local-bypass-with-trace; they audit-trail to a card. Doc-coherence ratchet warns when entries reference closed cards.

entries.reason: Werk-vs-canonical env friction: canonical .env at /chorus/.env, werks at /chorus-werk/<role>-<card>/ carry none. Cards CLI invoked from test resolves env relative to cwd (werk), finds nothing, fails with 'No .env file found and the canonical-env auth token not set'. Fix tracked under #2942.
Same werk-env root cause as smoke-pull-card-real — downstream env-gated service (Vikunja-backed embed) times out at 5s because canonical .env unreachable from werk. Fix tracked under #2942.
